summary: Hardened Dark Factory Home Hero. Implemented Liquid Fluid desktop artwork (clamp 40-75vw) with Zero-Invasion 35% gradient mask. Integrated Hero Product into mobile vertical stack (40vh) below CTAs with unified space-y-8 spacing and softened top-fade mask (h-10). Added pb-12 for bottom status bar separation. All changes verified and pushed to main.
next_steps: Monitor mobile conversion rates with the new integrated artwork.
Verify dark mode legibility on OLED devices specifically for the new softened masks.
Proceed to Product Detail Page (PDP) kinetic transitions if requested.
